course_correction_note.trigger: Three handler-local fixes failed because the payment-before-confirmation invariant spans two independently committed services without a shared transaction, durable outbox, or ordering coordinator; a fourth local patch cannot establish cross-service atomic ordering.
evidence_refs: Under a broker partition, OrderConfirmed can become visible before PaymentAuthorized because the events are published by separate services without shared transactional ordering.
Handler retry, fixed consumer delay, and a process-local flag all failed to preserve ordering across recovery, longer partitions, or service restarts.
The violated invariant spans two independently committed services, while all three failed fixes changed only handler-local behavior.
preserved_constraints: Preserve backward compatibility for existing event consumers.
Preserve the current incident containment flag while the architecture is corrected.
Do not weaken the payment-before-confirmation invariant.
